repo.description: Deep-learning system proposed by HFL for SemEval-2022 Task 8: Multilingual News Similarity

terms.context_snippet: Here, we provide the implementation of our winning system in Semeval-2022 Task8 —— Multilingual News Article Similarity. This is a competition about assessing the similarity of multilingual and crosslingual news articles which covers 18 language pairs.
